rationale: Educ. Code §39.008 governs school district certification of compliance with policies on educator conduct and instruction. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: Sec. 39.008. CERTIFICATION OF COMPLIANCE WITH CERTAIN LAWS REQUIRED.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts; no overlap with proposed change.
